name: blackboard-01
title: Blackboard
author: ilinxa
description: A dark-navy chalkboard widget where a team writes handwritten notes — per-note ink color, chalk width, and handwriting font, with auto-save, scroll-up lazy loading, inline author-on-hover, pin, @mentions, and a handwritten red unread marker. The board surface is themeable (color or custom image). Ships shadcn-style: a batteries-included <Blackboard01> plus a headless <BlackboardRoot> + flat à-la-carte parts, so dropping the composer yields a free read-only board. Portable — all persistence, real-time transport, and notifications are the consumer's via callbacks.
